title: nimble bootstrap vars
description: nimble bootstrap variables. OS Compatibility: All. Nim package manager.

CHOOSENIM_DIR.description: Installation directory for choosenim. Defaults to ~/.choosenim.

CHOOSENIM_CHOOSE_VERSION.description: Specific Nim version to install initially.

LOGS_DIR.description: Directory where logs should be stored.

SERVE_FROM.description: Base directory or context path from which the service should be served.

LIBSCRIPT_VERSION.description: Specifies the version of the package to use.
